_publications._publicationTitle: A role for the p53 pathway in the pathology of meningiomas with NF2 loss.

_contextSnippet: Distribution of the p53 codon 72 polymorphism among meningioma cases was found to be consistent with Hardy–Weinberg equilibrium, with allelic frequencies of 45.6%
details: Used for PCR amplification in p53 codon 72 polymorphism analysis, enabling detection of polymorphism distribution consistent with Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium
